strings.legal_bar: Credit is a commitment and must be repaid. Check your repayment capacity before taking out a loan.
strings.cookie_p1: During your browsing, Solfianza and its partners use functional and analytical cookies to ensure the proper functioning, security of the site and improvement of your experience by remembering your preferences.
strings.cookie_p2: With the exception of analytical cookies generating anonymous statistical data, to which you have a right to object, these cookies are essential to the operation of our site and do not require your consent.
strings.cookie_p3_pre: With your consent, we also place marketing cookies to analyse site performance and personalise our content. By clicking "Accept & Close", you consent to the use of all marketing cookies. You may, at any time, manage your choices by consulting our
strings.hpc_note: Fixed APR. Indicative offer, subject to application approval.
strings.hsc_title: Finance your projects with Solfianza consumer credit !
strings.hsc_sub: Simulate, apply in 5 minutes and get an instant decision !
strings.prod_h1: Credit offers tailored to your needs
strings.prod_h1_desc: Finance all your projects with fixed monthly payments. Processing fees, determined based on the amount and duration of the credit, may be applied. Their amount will be communicated to you transparently before any subscription. To find out the specific conditions for your project, please contact us.
strings.prod_h2_desc: Flexible solutions to simplify your day-to-day finances.
strings.editorial_h2: Solfianza, your trusted partner for financing your projects
strings.editorial_p1: Solfianza supports individuals in realising their projects through simple, accessible and tailored consumer credit solutions. A subsidiary of Crédit Agricole Consumer Finance, the company draws on the expertise and financial strength of a leading banking group to offer reliable and competitive financing solutions.
strings.editorial_p2: Whether you are planning to purchase a vehicle, carry out renovations, organise a trip or any other personal project, Solfianza offers credit solutions designed to adapt to your situation and your goals. Through a fully digital process, your application is simplified, fast and secure, with a decision in principle obtained within minutes.
strings.editorial_p3: Recognised for the quality of its support and its commitment to its clients, Solfianza places transparency and proximity at the heart of its approach. From simulating your financing to electronically signing your contract, every step is designed to provide you with a smooth, clear and reassuring experience.
strings.editorial_p4: With Solfianza, bring your projects to life with complete confidence.
strings.steps_h2: How to obtain your personal loan?
strings.step1_desc: Choose the amount and term that match your project.
strings.step2_desc: Get a decision in principle within minutes, with no commitment.
strings.step3_desc: Submit your supporting documents easily online from home.
strings.step4_desc: After approval, your funds are transferred quickly to your account.
strings.faq1_q: What types of loans does Solfianza offer?
strings.faq1_a: Solfianza offers personal loans (auto, home works, leisure…), revolving credit with or without a card, as well as debt consolidation to group your loans into a single reduced monthly payment.
strings.faq2_q: How long does it take to receive funds after loan approval?
strings.faq2_a: After electronically signing your contract, a legal 14-calendar-day withdrawal period applies. Once this period has elapsed, funds are generally transferred within 1 to 3 business days.
strings.faq3_q: How do I apply for a consumer loan?
strings.faq3_a: Go to our online simulator, choose your project and amount, then complete the application form. You will receive an immediate decision in principle and can finalise your application entirely online.
strings.faq4_q: What documents do I need to provide when applying for a loan?
strings.faq4_a: Generally, you will be asked for: a valid identity document, a recent proof of address, your latest payslips or proof of income, and your bank account details (IBAN).
strings.faq5_q: Is there a maximum age for borrowing?
strings.faq5_a: There is no legal maximum age for taking out a consumer loan. Solfianza reviews each application based on the borrower's repayment capacity. However, borrower insurance policies may include specific age conditions.
strings.sim_tagline: Simulate your project in a few clicks — simple and commitment-free!
strings.sim_step2_title: Now, let's talk about the financing amount
strings.sim_step2_sub: Enter the amount needed for your project:
strings.sim_amount_err: Please enter an amount between €3,000 and €200,000
